detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"First Seen:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                format!(\"  {}\", alert.created_at.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC\")),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"Last Updated:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                format!(\"  {}\", alert.updated_at.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC\")),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"Occurrences:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                format!(\"  {}\", alert.occurrence_count),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"Status:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            let status_text = if alert.acknowledged {\n                \"Acknowledged\"\n            } else if alert.is_active {\n                \"Active\"\n            } else {\n                \"Resolved\"\n            };\n            let status_color = if alert.acknowledged {\n                theme.colors.text_dim\n            } else if alert.is_active {\n                theme.colors.status_warning\n            } else {\n                theme.colors.status_healthy\n            };\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                format!(\"  {}\", status_text),\n                Style::default().fg(status_color),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n\n            // Actions\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"-\".repeat(30),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"Actions:\",\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(theme.colors.hotkey)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"  [Enter] Acknowledge this alert\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"  [A] Acknowledge all alerts\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"  [Up/Down] Navigate alerts\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n        } else {\n            detail_lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"Select an alert to view details\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        let detail_block = {\n            // Enhanced focus indicator for details panel\n            let focused = self.focus_panel == FocusPanel::AlertList;\n            let focus_icon = if focused { \"▶\" } else { \"▪\" };\n            let border_type = if focused {\n                BorderType::Double\n            } else {\n                BorderType::Plain\n            };\n            let border_style = if focused {\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(Color::Cyan)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)\n            } else {\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim)\n            };\n            let title_style = if focused {\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(Color::Cyan)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD | Modifier::UNDERLINED)\n            } else {\n                Style::default().fg(Color::Rgb(80, 80, 80))\n            };\n\n            Block::default()\n                .title(Span::styled(\n                    format!(\" {} Details \", focus_icon),\n                    title_style,\n                ))\n                .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                .border_type(border_type)\n                .border_style(border_style)\n        };\n\n        let detail_paragraph = Paragraph::new(detail_lines)\n            .block(detail_block)\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(detail_paragraph, chunks[1]);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the Chat view.\n    fn draw_chat(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        // Clear any previous content to prevent visual artifacts when switching views\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, area);\n\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n        let chunks = Layout::default()\n            .direction(Direction::Vertical)\n            .constraints([Constraint::Min(5), Constraint::Length(3)])\n            .split(area);\n\n        // Spinner animation frames (4-frame spinner)\n        const SPINNER_FRAMES: &[&str] = &[\"⠋\", \"⠙\", \"⠹\", \"⠸\"];\n\n        // Build styled chat history\n        let history_text = if self.chat_history.is_empty() {\n            // Adaptive empty state - no hard-coded indentation\n            Text::from(\n                \"Type commands or ask questions. Examples:\\n\\n  > show workers\\n  > spawn 2 glm workers\\n  > show P0 tasks\\n  > costs today\\n  > help\\n\\n  Press Esc to exit chat mode.\",\n            )\n        } else {\n            let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();\n\n            for exchange in &self.chat_history {\n                // User query line\n                lines.push(Line::styled(\n                    format!(\"[{}] You: {}\", exchange.timestamp, exchange.user_query),\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                ));\n\n                if exchange.is_error {\n                    // Error response with red styling\n                    for line in exchange.assistant_response.lines() {\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            format!(\"  ❌ {}\", line),\n                            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.status_error),\n                        ));\n                    }\n\n                    // Show error guidance if available (adaptive, no fixed-width borders)\n                    if let Some(ref guidance) = exchange.error_guidance {\n                        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Blank line\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            \"  💡 Suggested Action:\",\n                            Style::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                        ));\n                        for guidance_line in guidance.lines() {\n                            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                                format!(\"  ─ {}\", guidance_line),\n                                Style::default().fg(Color::Yellow),\n                            ));\n                        }\n                    }\n                } else {\n                    // Normal response\n                    for line in exchange.assistant_response.lines() {\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            format!(\"  Assistant: {}\", line),\n                            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                        ));\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Show tool execution results\n                if !exchange.tool_calls.is_empty() {\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        \"  ── Tool Results ──\",\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                    ));\n                    for tool in &exchange.tool_calls {\n                        let status_icon = if tool.success { \"✓\" } else { \"✗\" };\n                        let status_color = if tool.success {\n                            theme.colors.status_healthy\n                        } else {\n                            theme.colors.status_error\n                        };\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            format!(\"    {} {} {}\", status_icon, tool.name, tool.message),\n                            Style::default().fg(status_color),\n                        ));\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Show side effects\n                if !exchange.side_effects.is_empty() {\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        \"  ── Side Effects ──\",\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                    ));\n                    for effect in &exchange.side_effects {\n                        let effect_icon = match effect.effect_type.as_str() {\n                            \"spawn\" => \"🚀\",\n                            \"kill\" => \"💀\",\n                            \"assign\" => \"📌\",\n                            _ => \"⚡\",\n                        };\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            format!(\"    {} {}\", effect_icon, effect.description),\n                            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                        ));\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Show confirmation prompt if present\n                if let Some(ref confirmation) = exchange.confirmation {\n                    let level_color = match confirmation.level {\n                        ConfirmationLevel::Info => Color::Blue,\n                        ConfirmationLevel::Warning => Color::Yellow,\n                        ConfirmationLevel::Danger => Color::Red,\n                    };\n\n                    // Simple adaptive confirmation box - no fixed width borders\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        \"  ⚠️  CONFIRMATION REQUIRED\",\n                        Style::default().fg(level_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ));\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        format!(\"  ─ {}\", confirmation.title),\n                        Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                    ));\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        format!(\"  ─ {}\", confirmation.description),\n                        Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                    ));\n\n                    // Warning level indicator\n                    let level_text = match confirmation.level {\n                        ConfirmationLevel::Info => \"INFO\",\n                        ConfirmationLevel::Warning => \"WARNING\",\n                        ConfirmationLevel::Danger => \"DANGER\",\n                    };\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        format!(\"  ─ Level: {}\", level_text),\n                        Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                    ));\n\n                    // Cost impact\n                    if let Some(cost) = confirmation.cost_impact {\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            format!(\"  ─ Cost: ${:.4}\", cost),\n                            Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                        ));\n                    }\n\n                    // Affected items\n                    if !confirmation.affected_items.is_empty() {\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            \"  ─ Affected:\",\n                            Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                        ));\n                        for item in &confirmation.affected_items {\n                            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                                format!(\"    • {}\", item),\n                                Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                            ));\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    // Reversibility\n                    let reversible_text = if confirmation.reversible {\n                        \"Yes\"\n                    } else {\n                        \"No (permanent!)\"\n                    };\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        format!(\"  ─ Reversible: {}\", reversible_text),\n                        Style::default().fg(level_color),\n                    ));\n\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        \"  → Type 'yes' to confirm or 'no' to cancel\",\n                        Style::default().fg(level_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ));\n                }\n\n                // Show metadata (duration, cost, provider)\n                let meta = &exchange.metadata;\n                if meta.duration_ms > 0 || meta.cost_usd.is_some() || !meta.provider.is_empty() {\n                    let mut meta_parts = Vec::new();\n\n                    if meta.duration_ms > 0 {\n                        meta_parts.push(format!(\"{}ms\", meta.duration_ms));\n                    }\n\n                    if let Some(cost) = meta.cost_usd {\n                        meta_parts.push(format!(\"${:.4}\", cost));\n                    }\n\n                    if !meta.provider.is_empty() {\n                        meta_parts.push(meta.provider.clone());\n                    }\n\n                    if !meta_parts.is_empty() {\n                        lines.push(Line::styled(\n                            format!(\"  📊 [{}]\", meta_parts.join(\" | \")),\n                            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                        ));\n                    }\n                }\n\n                lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Blank line between exchanges\n            }\n\n            // Show streaming response or processing indicator\n            if self.streaming_active && !self.streaming_response.is_empty() {\n                // Show streaming response with a typing indicator (cursor only on last line)\n                let cursor = \"▌\"; // Block cursor for streaming effect\n                let response_lines: Vec<&str> = self.streaming_response.lines().collect();\n                let last_idx = response_lines.len().saturating_sub(1);\n                for (i, line) in response_lines.iter().enumerate() {\n                    let text = if i == last_idx && !self.streaming_response.ends_with('\\n') {\n                        format!(\"  Assistant: {}{}\", line, cursor)\n                    } else {\n                        format!(\"  Assistant: {}\", line)\n                    };\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(text, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)));\n                }\n                // If response ends with newline, show cursor on the next blank line\n                if self.streaming_response.ends_with('\\n') {\n                    lines.push(Line::styled(\n                        format!(\"  {}\", cursor),\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                    ));\n                }\n            } else if self.chat_pending {\n                let spinner = SPINNER_FRAMES[self.chat_spinner_frame % SPINNER_FRAMES.len()];\n                lines.push(Line::styled(\n                    format!(\"{} Processing your request...\", spinner),\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.hotkey),\n                ));\n                lines.push(Line::styled(\n                    \"  Executing tools...\",\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                ));\n            }\n\n            Text::from(lines)\n        };\n\n        // Draw history panel with enhanced focus indicator\n        let history_focused = self.focus_panel == FocusPanel::ChatInput;\n        let history_focus_icon = if history_focused { \"▶\" } else { \"▪\" };\n        let history_border_type = if history_focused {\n            BorderType::Double\n        } else {\n            BorderType::Plain\n        };\n        let history_border_style = if history_focused {\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(Color::Cyan)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim)\n        };\n        let history_title_style = if history_focused {\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(Color::Cyan)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD | Modifier::UNDERLINED)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(Color::Rgb(80, 80, 80))\n        };\n\n        // Auto-scroll to bottom: compute scroll offset so newest messages are visible.\n        // chat_scroll_offset=0 means at the bottom; higher values scroll upward.\n        // Account for text wrapping: each logical Line may occupy multiple visual rows.\n        let inner_width = chunks[0].width.saturating_sub(2); // subtract left/right borders\n        let total_visual_lines: u16 = if inner_width > 0 {\n            history_text.lines.iter().map(|line| {\n                let w = line.width() as u16;\n                if w == 0 { 1u16 } else { w.div_ceil(inner_width) }\n            }).sum()\n        } else {\n            history_text.lines.len() as u16\n        };\n        let visible_rows = chunks[0].height.saturating_sub(2); // subtract top/bottom borders\n        let auto_scroll = total_visual_lines.saturating_sub(visible_rows);\n        let scroll_y = auto_scroll.saturating_sub(self.chat_scroll_offset);\n\n        let history_panel = Paragraph::new(history_text)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_type(history_border_type)\n                    .border_style(history_border_style)\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        format!(\" {} Chat History \", history_focus_icon),\n                        history_title_style,\n                    )),\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false })\n            .scroll((scroll_y, 0));\n\n        frame.render_widget(history_panel, chunks[0]);\n\n        // Input field with enhanced focus indicator\n        let input_focused = self.focus_panel == FocusPanel::ChatInput;\n        let input_focus_icon = if input_focused { \"▶\" } else { \"▪\" };\n        let input_border_type = if input_focused {\n            BorderType::Double\n        } else {\n            BorderType::Plain\n        };\n        let input_border_style = if input_focused {\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(Color::Cyan)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim)\n        };\n        let input_title_style = if input_focused {\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(Color::Cyan)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD | Modifier::UNDERLINED)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(Color::Rgb(80, 80, 80))\n        };\n\n        let input_style = if input_focused {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.hotkey)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)\n        };\n\n        let cursor = if self.input_handler.is_chat_mode() {\n            \"█\"\n        } else {\n            \"\"\n        };\n\n        let input = Paragraph::new(format!(\"> {}{}\", self.chat_input, cursor))\n            .style(input_style)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_type(input_border_type)\n                    .border_style(input_border_style)\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        format!(\" {} Input \", input_focus_icon),\n                        input_title_style,\n                    )),\n            );\n\n        frame.render_widget(input, chunks[1]);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the Workspaces view for multi-workspace management.\n    fn draw_workspaces(&mut self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Update workspace panel data from registry\n        self.workspace_panel_data.update_from_registry(\n            &self.workspace_registry,\n            self.current_workspace_id.as_deref()\n        );\n\n        // Draw the workspace panel\n        crate::workspace_panel::draw_workspace_panel(\n            frame,\n            area,\n            &self.workspace_panel_data,\n            theme,\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the Audit log view.\n    fn draw_audit(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        use forge_core::audit::{AuditEvent, EventType};\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Query audit events using current filter\n        let events = if let Some(ref logger) = self.audit_logger {\n            logger.query(&self.audit_filter).unwrap_or_default()\n        } else {\n            vec![]\n        };\n\n        // Split into main content and footer\n        let chunks = Layout::default()\n            .direction(Direction::Vertical)\n            .constraints([Constraint::Min(0), Constraint::Length(2)])\n            .split(area);\n\n        // Build audit log lines\n        let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();\n\n        if events.is_empty() {\n            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"No audit events recorded\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"Audit events will appear here when:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"  - Workers are spawned, paused, resumed, or killed\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"  - Configuration values change\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                \"  - Bead status transitions occur\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            ));\n        } else {\n            // Header with filter info\n            let filter_info = if let Some(ref actor) = self.audit_filter.actor {\n                format!(\"Filtered by actor: {}\", actor)\n            } else if let Some(ref entity_type) = self.audit_filter.entity_type {\n                format!(\"Filtered by entity: {}\", entity_type)\n            } else if let Some(ref event_types) = self.audit_filter.event_types {\n                format!(\"Filtered by event types: {} types\", event_types.len())\n            } else {\n                \"All events\".to_string()\n            };\n\n            lines.push(Line::styled(\n                format!(\"Audit Log: {} events | {} | Retention: 90 days\",\n                    events.len(), filter_info),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            ));\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n\n            // Apply scroll offset\n            let visible_events: Vec<_> = events\n                .iter()\n                .skip(self.audit_scroll_offset)\n                .take(area.height.saturating_sub(5) as usize)\n                .collect();\n\n            for event in &visible_events {\n                // Format timestamp\n                let time_str = event.timestamp.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\").to_string();\n\n                // Color code by severity\n                let severity_color = match event.severity {\n                    forge_core::audit::Severity::Critical => theme.colors.status_error,\n                    forge_core::audit::Severity::Error => theme.colors.status_warning,\n                    forge_core::audit::Severity::Warning => Color::Yellow,\n                    forge_core::audit::Severity::Info => theme.colors.text_dim,\n                };\n\n                // Color code by event type\n                let event_color = match event.event_type {\n                    EventType::WorkerSpawn => Color::Green,\n                    EventType::WorkerKill => Color::Red,\n                    EventType::WorkerPause => Color::Yellow,\n                    EventType::WorkerResume => Color::Cyan,\n                    EventType::BeadStatusChange => Color::Blue,\n                    EventType::ConfigChange => Color::Magenta,\n                    EventType::Error => theme.colors.status_error,\n                    _ => theme.colors.text,\n                };\n\n                // Build the log line\n                let mut spans = vec![\n                    Span::styled(\n                        format!(\"[{}] \", time_str),\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                    ),\n                    Span::styled(\n                        format!(\"{:<20} \", event.event_type.to_string()),\n                        Style::default().fg(event_color),\n                    ),\n                    Span::styled(\n                        format!(\"{}:\", event.actor),\n                        Style::default().fg(Color::Cyan),\n                    ),\n                    Span::raw(\" \"),\n                    Span::styled(\n                        format!(\"{}:{}\", event.entity_type, event.entity_id),\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                    ),\n                ];\n\n                // Add old/new value if present (truncated)\n                if let Some(ref new_val) = event.new_value {\n                    let truncated = if new_val.len() > 30 {\n                        format!(\"{}...\", &new_val[..27])\n                    } else {\n                        new_val.clone()\n                    };\n                    spans.push(Span::raw(\" \"));\n                    spans.push(Span::styled(\n                        format!(\"-> {}\", truncated),\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                    ));\n                }\n\n                lines.push(Line::from(spans));\n            }\n\n            // Scroll indicator\n            let total_visible = visible_events.len();\n            if events.len() > total_visible || self.audit_scroll_offset > 0 {\n                lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n                lines.push(Line::styled(\n                    format!(\"Showing {}-{} of {} events (↑/↓ scroll, PgUp/PgDn page)\",\n                        self.audit_scroll_offset + 1,\n                        (self.audit_scroll_offset + total_visible).min(events.len()),\n                        events.len()),\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                ));\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Draw main content\n        let content = Paragraph::new(lines)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Audit Log \",\n                        Style::default()\n                            .fg(theme.colors.header)\n                            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(content, chunks[0]);\n\n        // Footer with hints\n        let footer_text = \" [E] Export JSON  [C] Export CSV  [F] Filter  [R] Reset filter  [?] Stats \";\n        let footer = Paragraph::new(footer_text)\n            .style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim))\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim)),\n            );\n\n        frame.render_widget(footer, chunks[1]);\n    }\n\n\n    /// Draw a panel with optional highlight.\n    fn draw_panel(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, title: &str, content: &str, focused: bool) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Enhanced focus indicator: \"▶\" arrow for focused (clearer than diamond), \"▪\" for unfocused\n        let focus_icon = if focused { \"▶\" } else { \"▪\" };\n\n        // Border type: Double border for focused (highly visible), Normal for unfocused\n        let border_type = if focused {\n            BorderType::Double\n        } else {\n            BorderType::Plain\n        };\n\n        // Border style: bright focus_highlight for focused, very dim for unfocused\n        let border_style = if focused {\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(theme.colors.focus_highlight)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim)\n        };\n\n        // Title style: bold + bright + underlined for focused, dim for unfocused\n        let title_style = if focused {\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(theme.colors.focus_highlight)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD | Modifier::UNDERLINED)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.unfocused_text)\n        };\n\n        // Content style: bright for focused panels, significantly dimmed for unfocused\n        let content_style = if focused {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)\n        } else {\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.unfocused_text)\n        };\n\n        let panel = Paragraph::new(content)\n            .style(content_style)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_type(border_type)\n                    .border_style(border_style)\n                    .title(Span::styled(format!(\" {} {} \", focus_icon, title), title_style)),\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(panel, area);\n    }\n\n    /// Poll for data updates. Called from the main loop.\n    #[allow(dead_code)]\n    pub fn poll_data(&mut self) {\n        self.data_manager.poll_updates();\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the help overlay.\n    fn draw_help_overlay(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n        // Calculate centered overlay area - increased size for more content\n        let overlay_width = 70.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_height = 32.min(area.height.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_x = (area.width - overlay_width) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height - overlay_height) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, overlay_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        let help_text = \"\\\nFORGE Hotkey Reference\n\nView Navigation:\n  O        Overview (dashboard)\n  w/W      Workers view\n  t/T      Tasks view\n  c        Costs view\n  m        Metrics view\n  l/a      Activity/Logs view\n  Z        Audit log view\n  :        Chat input mode\n  Tab      Cycle views forward\n  Shift+Tab Cycle views backward\n\nWorker Management:\n  g/G      Spawn GLM worker\n  s/S      Spawn Sonnet worker\n  o        Spawn Opus worker\n  h        Spawn Haiku worker\n  k        Kill worker dialog\n\nTasks View:\n  0-4      Filter by priority (P0-P4)\n  x        Clear priority filter\n  Enter    Show task details\n\nAudit View:\n  e        Export to JSON\n  c        Export to CSV\n  f        Filter options\n  r        Reset filter\n  ?        Show statistics\n\nGeneral:\n  ?        Show this help\n  q/Q      Quit\n  Esc      Cancel / Close overlay\n  Ctrl+C   Force quit\n  Ctrl+L   Refresh screen\n  Ctrl+U   Update forge (rebuild & restart)\n  C        Cycle theme\n\nNavigation:\n  ↑        Move up\n  ↓/j      Move down\n  PgUp     Page up\n  PgDn     Page down\n  Home     Go to top\n  End      Go to bottom\n  Enter    Select/expand item\n  Space    Toggle selection\n\nPress any key to close this help.\";\n\n        let help = Paragraph::new(help_text)\n            .style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text))\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.header))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Help \",\n                        Style::default()\n                            .fg(theme.colors.header)\n                            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n                    .style(Style::default().bg(Color::Black)),\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(help, overlay_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the kill worker dialog overlay.\n    fn draw_kill_dialog(&mut self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Calculate dialog dimensions based on content\n        let overlay_width = 70.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let max_height = 20.min(area.height.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_x = (area.width - overlay_width) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height - max_height) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, max_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        // Build dialog content\n        let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();\n\n        // Header\n        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n            \"Select a worker to kill:\",\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(theme.colors.text)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n        )));\n        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n        if self.kill_dialog_workers.is_empty() {\n            // No workers message\n            let msg = self\n                .kill_dialog_error\n                .as_deref()\n                .unwrap_or(\"No active workers found\");\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                msg,\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.status_warning),\n            )));\n        } else {\n            // Worker list\n            for (i, worker) in self.kill_dialog_workers.iter().enumerate() {\n                let is_selected = i == self.kill_dialog_selected;\n\n                // Format: [ ] worker-suffix (type, attached/detached, age)\n                let checkbox = if is_selected { \"[x] \" } else { \"[ ] \" };\n                let attached_str = if worker.is_attached {\n                    \"attached\"\n                } else {\n                    \"detached\"\n                };\n                let worker_line = format!(\n                    \"{}{} ({}, {}, age: {})\",\n                    checkbox,\n                    worker.suffix,\n                    worker.worker_type,\n                    attached_str,\n                    worker.age()\n                );\n\n                let style = if is_selected {\n                    Style::default()\n                        .fg(Color::Black)\n                        .bg(theme.colors.hotkey)\n                        .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)\n                } else {\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)\n                };\n\n                lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(worker_line, style)));\n            }\n        }\n\n        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n        // Error message if any\n        if let Some(ref err) = self.kill_dialog_error {\n            if !self.kill_dialog_workers.is_empty() {\n                // Only show if we have workers (otherwise it's the \"no workers\" message)\n                lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                    format!(\"Error: {}\", err),\n                    Style::default().fg(Color::Red),\n                )));\n                lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Footer with instructions\n        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n            \"↑/k: up  ↓/j: down  Enter: kill  Esc/q: cancel\",\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n        )));\n\n        let dialog = Paragraph::new(lines)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(Color::Red))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Kill Worker \",\n                        Style::default().fg(Color::Red).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n                    .style(Style::default().bg(Color::Black)),\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(dialog, overlay_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the confirmation dialog overlay.\n    fn draw_confirmation_dialog(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Get dialog content based on pending action\n        let (title, message, _action_text) = match &self.pending_action {\n            Some(PendingAction::SpawnWorker(executor)) => (\n                \" Spawn Worker \",\n                format!(\"Are you sure you want to spawn a {} worker?\", executor.name()),\n                \"spawn\",\n            ),\n            Some(PendingAction::KillWorker { suffix, worker_type }) => (\n                \" Kill Worker \",\n                format!(\n                    \"Are you sure you want to kill worker {} ({})?\",\n                    suffix, worker_type\n                ),\n                \"kill\",\n            ),\n            Some(PendingAction::PauseWorker { worker_id }) => (\n                \" Pause Worker \",\n                format!(\n                    \"Are you sure you want to pause worker {}?\\nThis will suspend the worker's tmux session.\",\n                    worker_id\n                ),\n                \"pause\",\n            ),\n            Some(PendingAction::PauseAllWorkers { count }) => (\n                \" Pause All Workers \",\n                format!(\n                    \"Are you sure you want to pause {} worker(s)?\\nThis will suspend all active tmux sessions.\",\n                    count\n                ),\n                \"pause all\",\n            ),\n            Some(PendingAction::ResumeWorker { worker_id }) => (\n                \" Resume Worker \",\n                format!(\n                    \"Are you sure you want to resume worker {}?\\nThis will continue the worker's tmux session.\",\n                    worker_id\n                ),\n                \"resume\",\n            ),\n            Some(PendingAction::ResumeAllWorkers { count }) => (\n                \" Resume All Workers \",\n                format!(\n                    \"Are you sure you want to resume {} paused worker(s)?\\nThis will continue all paused tmux sessions.\",\n                    count\n                ),\n                \"resume all\",\n            ),\n            None => return, // No action pending, don't draw\n        };\n\n        // Calculate dialog dimensions\n        let overlay_width = 60.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_height = 9.min(area.height.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_x = (area.width - overlay_width) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height - overlay_height) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, overlay_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        // Build dialog content\n        let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();\n\n        // Message\n        for line in message.lines() {\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                line,\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            )));\n        }\n\n        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n        // Instructions with [y] Yes / [n] No / [Esc] Cancel format\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"[\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\"y\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.hotkey).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)),\n            Span::styled(\"] Yes  \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\"[\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\"n\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.hotkey).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)),\n            Span::styled(\"] No  \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\"[\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\"Esc\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.hotkey).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)),\n            Span::styled(\"] Cancel\", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n        ]));\n\n        // Determine border color based on action type\n        let border_color = match &self.pending_action {\n            Some(PendingAction::PauseWorker { .. }) | Some(PendingAction::PauseAllWorkers { .. }) => Color::Yellow,\n            Some(PendingAction::ResumeWorker { .. }) | Some(PendingAction::ResumeAllWorkers { .. }) => Color::Green,\n            Some(PendingAction::KillWorker { .. }) => Color::Red,\n            Some(PendingAction::SpawnWorker(_)) => Color::Cyan,\n            None => theme.colors.border_dim,\n        };\n\n        let dialog = Paragraph::new(lines)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(border_color))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        title,\n                        Style::default().fg(border_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n                    .style(Style::default().bg(Color::Black)),\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(dialog, overlay_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the task detail overlay.\n    fn draw_task_detail_overlay(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Get the aggregated bead data and find the selected bead\n        let data = self\n            .data_manager\n            .bead_manager\n            .get_filtered_aggregated_data(self.priority_filter);\n\n        // Build a flattened list of all beads with their section info\n        let mut all_beads: Vec<(String, &crate::bead::Bead, &str)> = Vec::new();\n\n        // Add in-progress beads\n        for (ws, bead) in &data.in_progress {\n            all_beads.push((ws.clone(), bead, \"In Progress\"));\n        }\n\n        // Add ready beads\n        for (ws, bead) in &data.ready {\n            all_beads.push((ws.clone(), bead, \"Ready\"));\n        }\n\n        // Add blocked beads\n        for (ws, bead) in &data.blocked {\n            all_beads.push((ws.clone(), bead, \"Blocked\"));\n        }\n\n        // Calculate dialog dimensions\n        let overlay_width = 70.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_height = 20.min(area.height.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_x = (area.width.saturating_sub(overlay_width)) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height.saturating_sub(overlay_height)) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, overlay_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        let mut lines = Vec::new();\n\n        // Check if we have beads to show\n        if all_beads.is_empty() {\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"No tasks available\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"Tasks will appear here when beads are loaded from .beads/*.jsonl\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n        } else {\n            // Clamp selected index to valid range\n            let idx = self.selected_task_index.min(all_beads.len() - 1);\n            let (ws, bead, section) = &all_beads[idx];\n\n            // Header with task ID and priority\n            let header = format!(\n                \"{} {} [{}] - {}\",\n                bead.priority_indicator(),\n                bead.id,\n                bead.priority_str(),\n                section\n            );\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                header,\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(theme.colors.hotkey)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            )));\n\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"─\".repeat(overlay_width as usize - 2),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim),\n            )));\n\n            // Title\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"Title:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                &bead.title,\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            )));\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Status\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Status: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(\n                    &bead.status,\n                    Style::default().fg(match bead.status.as_str() {\n                        \"in_progress\" => Color::Yellow,\n                        \"open\" => Color::Green,\n                        \"closed\" => Color::DarkGray,\n                        \"blocked\" => Color::Red,\n                        _ => theme.colors.text,\n                    }),\n                ),\n            ]));\n\n            // Priority and score\n            let score = bead.score();\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Priority: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(\n                    format!(\"P{}\", bead.priority),\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                ),\n                Span::raw(\"    \"),\n                Span::styled(\"Score: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(format!(\"{}\", score), Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n            ]));\n\n            // Dependencies\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Dependencies: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(\n                    format!(\n                        \"{} blocked by, {} depends on this\",\n                        bead.dependency_count, bead.dependent_count\n                    ),\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                ),\n            ]));\n\n            // Workspace\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Workspace: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(ws, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n            ]));\n\n            // Assignee\n            if let Some(ref assignee) = bead.assignee {\n                lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                    Span::styled(\"Assignee: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                    Span::styled(assignee, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n                ]));\n            }\n\n            // Labels\n            if !bead.labels.is_empty() {\n                lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                    Span::styled(\"Labels: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                    Span::styled(\n                        bead.labels.join(\", \"),\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                    ),\n                ]));\n            }\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Description (truncated)\n            if !bead.description.is_empty() {\n                lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                    \"Description:\",\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n                )));\n                let desc_lines: Vec<&str> = bead.description.lines().take(5).collect();\n                for line in desc_lines {\n                    let truncated = if line.len() > (overlay_width as usize - 4) {\n                        format!(\"{}...\", &line[..(overlay_width as usize - 7)])\n                    } else {\n                        line.to_string()\n                    };\n                    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                        truncated,\n                        Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                    )));\n                }\n            }\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Navigation info\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                format!(\n                    \"Task {} of {}  |  ↑/k: prev  ↓/j: next  Esc: close\",\n                    idx + 1,\n                    all_beads.len()\n                ),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n        }\n\n        let dialog = Paragraph::new(lines)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.header))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Task Details \",\n                        Style::default()\n                            .fg(theme.colors.header)\n                            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n                    .style(Style::default().bg(Color::Black)),\n            )\n            .wrap(Wrap { trim: false });\n\n        frame.render_widget(dialog, overlay_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw update notification banner at the top of the screen.\n    fn draw_update_banner(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        // Create banner area at the top (below header)\n        let banner_y = 3; // Right below the header (which is 3 lines)\n        let banner_height = 3;\n        let banner_area = Rect::new(\n            area.width / 4, // Center horizontally\n            banner_y,\n            area.width / 2,\n            banner_height,\n        );\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, banner_area);\n\n        let banner_text = \" ⚠️  Update Available! Press Ctrl+U to update forge \";\n        let banner = Paragraph::new(banner_text)\n            .style(\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(Color::Black)\n                    .bg(Color::Yellow)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            )\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),\n            )\n            .alignment(ratatui::layout::Alignment::Center);\n\n        frame.render_widget(banner, banner_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw network unreachable banner at the top of the screen.\n    fn draw_network_banner(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        // Position below the header (and potentially below update banner if both are showing)\n        let banner_y = if self.update_available { 6 } else { 3 };\n        let banner_height = 3;\n        let banner_width = (area.width * 2 / 3).min(60);\n        let banner_area = Rect::new(\n            (area.width.saturating_sub(banner_width)) / 2, // Center horizontally\n            banner_y,\n            banner_width,\n            banner_height,\n        );\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, banner_area);\n\n        // Format the duration if available\n        let duration_text = if let Some(since) = self.network_unavailable_since {\n            let secs = since.elapsed().as_secs();\n            if secs < 60 {\n                format!(\" ({}s)\", secs)\n            } else {\n                format!(\" ({}m {}s)\", secs / 60, secs % 60)\n            }\n        } else {\n            String::new()\n        };\n\n        // Get error message or use default\n        let error_detail = self.network_error_message.as_deref().unwrap_or(\"Network unreachable\");\n\n        let banner_text = format!(\"📡 {}{} | Press 'r' to retry\", error_detail, duration_text);\n        let banner = Paragraph::new(banner_text)\n            .style(\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(Color::White)\n                    .bg(Color::Red)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            )\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(Color::LightRed)),\n            )\n            .alignment(ratatui::layout::Alignment::Center);\n\n        frame.render_widget(banner, banner_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the alert detail overlay.\n    fn draw_alert_detail_overlay(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        use crate::alert::{AlertSeverity, AlertType};\n\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Get alerts sorted by severity\n        let alerts = self.data_manager.alert_manager.alerts_by_severity();\n\n        // Calculate dialog dimensions\n        let overlay_width = 80.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_height = 20.min(area.height.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_x = (area.width.saturating_sub(overlay_width)) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height.saturating_sub(overlay_height)) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, overlay_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        let mut lines = Vec::new();\n\n        // Default severity color for when no alerts exist\n        let mut severity_color = theme.colors.text_dim;\n\n        // Check if we have alerts to show\n        if alerts.is_empty() {\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"No alerts available\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\"));\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"Alerts will appear here when worker health issues are detected.\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n        } else {\n            // Clamp selected index to valid range\n            let idx = self.selected_alert_index.min(alerts.len() - 1);\n            let alert = alerts[idx];\n\n            // Determine severity color\n            severity_color = match alert.severity {\n                AlertSeverity::Critical => theme.colors.status_error,\n                AlertSeverity::Warning => theme.colors.status_warning,\n                AlertSeverity::Info => theme.colors.text_dim,\n            };\n\n            // Header with severity icon and title\n            let header = format!(\n                \"{} {} - {}\",\n                alert.severity.icon(),\n                alert.alert_type.title(),\n                alert.worker_id\n            );\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                header,\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(severity_color)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            )));\n\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"─\".repeat(overlay_width as usize - 2),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim),\n            )));\n\n            // Severity and acknowledgment status\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Severity: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(\n                    format!(\"{:?}\", alert.severity),\n                    Style::default().fg(severity_color),\n                ),\n                Span::raw(\"    \"),\n                Span::styled(\"Status: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(\n                    if alert.acknowledged { \"Acknowledged\" } else { \"Active\" },\n                    Style::default().fg(if alert.acknowledged {\n                        Color::DarkGray\n                    } else {\n                        Color::Yellow\n                    }),\n                ),\n            ]));\n\n            // Alert type\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Type: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(alert.alert_type.title(), Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n            ]));\n\n            // Worker ID\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Worker: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(&alert.worker_id, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n            ]));\n\n            // Timestamps\n            let created_str = alert.created_at.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC\").to_string();\n            let updated_str = alert.updated_at.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC\").to_string();\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Created: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(created_str, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n            ]));\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Updated: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(updated_str, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n            ]));\n\n            // Occurrence count\n            if alert.occurrence_count > 1 {\n                lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                    Span::styled(\"Occurrences: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                    Span::styled(\n                        format!(\"{} times\", alert.occurrence_count),\n                        Style::default().fg(severity_color),\n                    ),\n                ]));\n            }\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Message\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"Message:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n\n            // Simple truncation for message (take first few lines)\n            let msg_lines: Vec<&str> = alert.message.lines().take(3).collect();\n            for line in msg_lines {\n                let truncated = if line.len() > (overlay_width as usize - 4) {\n                    format!(\"{}...\", &line[..(overlay_width as usize - 7)])\n                } else {\n                    line.to_string()\n                };\n                lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                    truncated,\n                    Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n                )));\n            }\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Suggested action based on alert type\n            let suggested_action = match alert.alert_type {\n                AlertType::WorkerCrashed => \"Check worker logs, verify process health, consider restarting worker\",\n                AlertType::WorkerZombie => \"Kill zombie process, investigate parent process, restart worker\",\n                AlertType::WorkerStale => \"Check if worker is stuck, verify network connectivity, restart if needed\",\n                AlertType::TaskStuck => \"Review current task, check for deadlocks, consider timeout/kill\",\n                AlertType::MemoryHigh => \"Check for memory leaks, restart worker, monitor resource usage\",\n                AlertType::WorkerUnresponsive => \"Verify network, check process health, restart if unresponsive\",\n                AlertType::AutoRestartTriggered => \"Monitor restart progress, check logs for failure patterns\",\n                AlertType::RecoveryExhausted => \"Manual intervention required - check system logs and worker health\",\n                AlertType::WorkerRecovered => \"No action needed - worker has recovered\",\n                AlertType::WorkerSpawned => \"Monitor new worker - verify it starts correctly\",\n            };\n\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                \"Suggested Action:\",\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n            // Simple truncation for suggested action\n            let action_lines: Vec<&str> = suggested_action.lines().take(2).collect();\n            for line in action_lines {\n                let truncated = if line.len() > (overlay_width as usize - 4) {\n                    format!(\"{}...\", &line[..(overlay_width as usize - 7)])\n                } else {\n                    line.to_string()\n                };\n                lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                    truncated,\n                    Style::default().fg(Color::Cyan),\n                )));\n            }\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Recovery status\n            let recovery_status = if alert.is_active {\n                if alert.acknowledged {\n                    \"Acknowledged (still active)\"\n                } else {\n                    \"Active - awaiting acknowledgment\"\n                }\n            } else {\n                \"Resolved - worker has recovered\"\n            };\n            lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n                Span::styled(\"Recovery Status: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n                Span::styled(\n                    recovery_status,\n                    Style::default().fg(if alert.is_active {\n                        Color::Yellow\n                    } else {\n                        Color::Green\n                    }),\n                ),\n            ]));\n\n            lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n            // Navigation info\n            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n                format!(\n                    \"Alert {} of {}  |  ↑/k: prev  ↓/j: next  Enter: acknowledge  Esc: close\",\n                    idx + 1,\n                    alerts.len()\n                ),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n            )));\n        }\n\n        let dialog = Paragraph::new(lines)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(severity_color))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Alert Details \",\n                        Style::default()\n                            .fg(severity_color)\n                            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n                    .style(Style::default().bg(Color::Black)),\n            )\n            .alignment(ratatui::layout::Alignment::Left)\n            .wrap(ratatui::widgets::Wrap { trim: true });\n\n        frame.render_widget(dialog, overlay_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw the workspace detail overlay.\n    fn draw_workspace_detail_overlay(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Get the selected workspace\n        let selected_ws = match self.workspace_panel_data.selected() {\n            Some(ws) => ws,\n            None => return,\n        };\n\n        // Calculate dialog dimensions\n        let overlay_width = 80.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_height = 22.min(area.height.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_x = (area.width.saturating_sub(overlay_width)) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height.saturating_sub(overlay_height)) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, overlay_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        let mut lines = Vec::new();\n\n        // Header with workspace name\n        let header = format!(\"Workspace: {}\", selected_ws.name);\n        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n            header,\n            Style::default()\n                .fg(theme.colors.header)\n                .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n        )));\n\n        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n            \"─\".repeat(overlay_width as usize - 2),\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim),\n        )));\n\n        // Workspace ID\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"ID: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(&selected_ws.id, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n        ]));\n\n        // Workspace name\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Name: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(&selected_ws.name, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n        ]));\n\n        // Workspace path\n        let path_display = if selected_ws.path.len() > (overlay_width as usize - 12) {\n            format!(\"...{}\", &selected_ws.path[selected_ws.path.len() - (overlay_width as usize - 15)..])\n        } else {\n            selected_ws.path.clone()\n        };\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Path: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(path_display, Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text)),\n        ]));\n\n        // Status\n        let status_text = if selected_ws.is_current {\n            \"Current ★\"\n        } else if selected_ws.enabled {\n            \"Enabled\"\n        } else {\n            \"Disabled\"\n        };\n        let status_color = if selected_ws.is_current {\n            theme.colors.status_healthy\n        } else if selected_ws.enabled {\n            theme.colors.status_warning\n        } else {\n            theme.colors.text_dim\n        };\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Status: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(status_text, Style::default().fg(status_color)),\n        ]));\n\n        // Accessibility\n        let accessible_text = if selected_ws.is_accessible { \"Yes\" } else { \"No\" };\n        let accessible_color = if selected_ws.is_accessible {\n            theme.colors.status_healthy\n        } else {\n            theme.colors.status_error\n        };\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Accessible: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(accessible_text, Style::default().fg(accessible_color)),\n        ]));\n\n        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n        // Workers\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Workers: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\n                format!(\"{}\", selected_ws.worker_count),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            ),\n        ]));\n\n        // Cost\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Total Cost: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\n                format!(\"${:.2}\", selected_ws.total_cost),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            ),\n        ]));\n\n        // Beads\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Beads: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\n                format!(\"{}\", selected_ws.bead_count),\n                Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text),\n            ),\n        ]));\n\n        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n        // Data availability indicators\n        lines.push(Line::from(vec![\n            Span::styled(\"Cost Data: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\n                if selected_ws.has_costs { \"Yes\" } else { \"No\" },\n                Style::default().fg(if selected_ws.has_costs {\n                    theme.colors.status_healthy\n                } else {\n                    theme.colors.text_dim\n                }),\n            ),\n            Span::raw(\"    \"),\n            Span::styled(\"Bead Data: \", Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim)),\n            Span::styled(\n                if selected_ws.has_beads { \"Yes\" } else { \"No\" },\n                Style::default().fg(if selected_ws.has_beads {\n                    theme.colors.status_healthy\n                } else {\n                    theme.colors.text_dim\n                }),\n            ),\n        ]));\n\n        lines.push(Line::raw(\"\")); // Empty line\n\n        // Navigation info\n        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(\n            \"↑/↓: navigate workspaces  Enter: switch to workspace  Esc: close\",\n            Style::default().fg(theme.colors.text_dim),\n        )));\n\n        let dialog = Paragraph::new(lines)\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Workspace Details \",\n                        Style::default()\n                            .fg(theme.colors.action_view)\n                            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    ))\n                    .style(Style::default().bg(Color::Black)),\n            )\n            .alignment(ratatui::layout::Alignment::Left)\n            .wrap(ratatui::widgets::Wrap { trim: true });\n\n        frame.render_widget(dialog, overlay_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw a status message as a toast/notification at the bottom of the screen.\n    fn draw_status_message(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, message: &str) {\n        let theme = self.theme_manager.current();\n\n        // Create a small banner at the bottom center\n        let msg_width = (message.len() + 4).min(area.width as usize - 4) as u16;\n        let banner_x = (area.width.saturating_sub(msg_width)) / 2;\n        let banner_y = area.height.saturating_sub(5); // Just above footer\n\n        let banner_area = Rect::new(banner_x, banner_y, msg_width, 3);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, banner_area);\n\n        let banner = Paragraph::new(message)\n            .style(\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(theme.colors.text)\n                    .bg(Color::DarkGray)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            )\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(theme.colors.border_dim)),\n            )\n            .alignment(ratatui::layout::Alignment::Center);\n\n        frame.render_widget(banner, banner_area);\n    }\n\n    /// Draw a prominent overlay when update is in progress.\n    fn draw_update_progress_overlay(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {\n        // Create a centered overlay\n        let overlay_width = 60.min(area.width.saturating_sub(4));\n        let overlay_height = 7;\n        let overlay_x = (area.width.saturating_sub(overlay_width)) / 2;\n        let overlay_y = (area.height.saturating_sub(overlay_height)) / 2;\n\n        let overlay_area = Rect::new(overlay_x, overlay_y, overlay_width, overlay_height);\n\n        // Clear background\n        frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay_area);\n\n        // Status text from update_progress or status_message\n        let status_text = if !self.update_progress.status.is_empty() {\n            &self.update_progress.status\n        } else {\n            self.status_message\n                .as_deref()\n                .unwrap_or(\"Updating forge...\")\n        };\n\n        // Create progress bar\n        let progress_percent = self.update_progress.percent as usize;\n        let bar_width = (overlay_width as usize).saturating_sub(4);\n        let filled = (bar_width * progress_percent) / 100;\n        let empty = bar_width - filled;\n\n        let progress_bar = format!(\n            \"[{}{}] {}%\",\n            \"=\".repeat(filled),\n            \" \".repeat(empty),\n            progress_percent\n        );\n\n        let content = format!(\n            \"\\n  {}\\n\\n  {}\\n  \",\n            status_text, progress_bar\n        );\n\n        let overlay = Paragraph::new(content)\n            .style(\n                Style::default()\n                    .fg(Color::White)\n                    .bg(Color::Blue)\n                    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n            )\n            .block(\n                Block::default()\n                    .borders(Borders::ALL)\n                    .border_style(Style::default().fg(Color::LightBlue))\n                    .title(Span::styled(\n                        \" Forge Update (Ctrl+U) \",\n                        Style::default()\n                            .fg(Color::White)\n                            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),\n                    )),\n            )\n            .alignment(ratatui::layout::Alignment::Left);\n\n        frame.render_widget(overlay, overlay_area);\n    }\n}\n\n/// Truncate an error message for status bar display.\nfn truncate_status_error(err: &str) -> String {\n    if err.len() <= 20 {\n        err.to_string()\n    } else {\n        format!(\"{}...\", &err[..17])\n    }\n}\n\n/// Truncate a string for JSON metadata in audit logs.\n///\n/// Ensures strings don't exceed max_length by truncating and adding \"...\".\n/// Also escapes double quotes for JSON safety.\nfn truncate_str_for_json(s: &str, max_length: usize) -> String {\n    let escaped = s.replace('\"', \"\\\\\\\"\");\n    if escaped.len() <= max_length {\n        escaped\n    } else {\n        format!(\"{}...\", &escaped[..max_length.saturating_sub(3)])\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use ratatui::backend::TestBackend;\n    use ratatui::buffer::Buffer;\n\n    /// Helper to create a test terminal with specified dimensions\n    fn test_terminal(width: u16, height: u16) -> Terminal<TestBackend> {\n        let backend = TestBackend::new(width, height);\n        Terminal::new(backend).unwrap()\n    }\n\n    /// Helper to render app and get the buffer\n    fn render_app(app: &mut App, width: u16, height: u16) -> Buffer {\n        let mut terminal = test_terminal(width, height);\n        terminal.draw(|frame| app.draw(frame)).unwrap();\n        terminal.backend().buffer().clone()\n    }\n\n    /// Check if a buffer contains a specific string\n    fn buffer_contains(buffer: &Buffer, text: &str) -> bool {\n        let content = buffer_to_string(buffer);\n        content.contains(text)\n    }\n\n    /// Convert buffer to string for debugging/searching\n    fn buffer_to_string(buffer: &Buffer) -> String {\n        let area = buffer.area;\n        let mut result = String::new();\n        for y in 0..area.height {\n            for x in 0..area.width {\n                result.push(buffer[(x, y)].symbol().chars().next().unwrap_or(' '));\n            }\n            result.push('\\n');\n        }\n        result\n    }\n\n    // ============================================================\n    // Dashboard Panel Rendering Tests\n    // ============================================================\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_overview_renders_worker_pool_panel() {\n        let mut app =    \"Overview should render Worker Pool panel\"\n        );\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_overview_renders_utilization_panel() {\n        let mut app = App::new();\n        // Use wide layout should render Performance Analytics panel\"\n        );\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_all_six_panel_types_render() {\n        // Test that all 6 FocusPanel types have corresponding views that render\n        let mut app = App::new();\n\n        // 1. Worker Pool (Overview - switch to Workers first, then back to Overview)\n        // The app starts in Overview, so switch_view(Overview) won't change focus\n        app.switch_view(View::Workers);\n        app.switch_view(View::Overview);\n        assert_eq!(app.focus_panel(), FocusPanel::WorkerPool);\n        // Use ultra-wide layout (199+ cols) to ensure all 6 panels are visible\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 199, 38);\n        assert!(buffer_contains(&buffer, \"Worker Pool\"));\n\n        // 2. Subscriptions (part of Overview) - visible in ultra-wide layout\n        assert!(buffer_contains(&buffer, \"Subscriptions\"));\n\n        // 3. Task Queue (Tasks view)\n        app.switch_view(View::Tasks);\n        assert_eq!(app.focus_panel(), FocusPanel::TaskQueue);\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 100, 30);\n        assert!(buffer_contains(&buffer, \"Task Queue\"));\n\n        // 4. Activity Log (Logs view)\n        app.switch_view(View::Logs);\n        assert_eq!(app.focus_panel(), FocusPanel::ActivityLog);\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 100, 30);\n        assert!(buffer_contains(&buffer, \"Activity Log\"));\n\n        // 5. Cost Breakdown (Costs view)\n        app.switch_view(View::Costs);\n        assert_eq!(app.focus_panel(), FocusPanel::CostBreakdown);\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 100, 30);\n        assert!(buffer_contains(&buffer, \"Cost Analytics\"));\n\n        // 6. Metrics Charts (Metrics view)\n        app.switch_view(View::Metrics);\n        assert_eq!(app.focus_panel(), FocusPanel::MetricsCharts);\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 100, 30);\n        assert!(buffer_contains(&buffer, \"Performance Analytics\"));\n    }\n\n    // ============================================================\n    // Border Rendering Tests\n    // ============================================================\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_panels_render_with_borders() {\n        let mut app = App::new();\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app,    fn test_minimum_viable_terminal_size() {\n        let mut app = App::new();\n\n        // Minimum size that should still render something\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 20, 10);\n\n test_help_overlay_renders() {\n        let mut app = App::new();\n        app.handle_app_event(AppEvent::ShowHelp);\n        let buffer = render_app(&mut app, 100, 40);\n\n render\"\n        );\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_help_overlay_shows_navigation_keys() {\n        let mut app = App::new();\n        app.handle_app_event(AppEvent::ShowHelp);\n        let buffer
